name: Old Fashioned Cod Fish Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound fresh cod fish or 1 pound
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the codfish until it is tender and flaky.
2. Crumble in a medium bowl; let cool.
3. Boil the potatoes and mash them.
4. Chop the onion finely and add it to the crumbled cod fish.
5. Add all other ingredients; mix thoroughly.
6. Form into cakes and fry in hot oil until golden brown.
7. Serve immediately.
8. Makes 8 cakes.
